completed_work: Automated system pulling billing data from all 9 AMs into one Master tab

recent_updates.summary: Phase 1 complete. Master file consolidation system is live and being used by all 9 AMs.

projects.summary_for_manager: Phase 1 of the Billing Optimization project is complete. An automated system now pulls billing data from all 9 Account Managers into one Master tab with real-time validation, error detection, and regional analytics. This is live and in use.

projects.current_focus: Michael Weintraub deploying Salesforce email notification trigger for campaign end dates
completed_work: Meeting held with Michael Weintraub and Jeanette Sarmiento on Jun 23
Jira ticket approach evaluated and rejected due to Salesforce architecture limitations
Email distribution list approach selected and approved by team
Michael Weintraub committed to deploying Salesforce trigger for US campaigns by end of week
Jeanette Sarmiento to provide distribution list of recipients to Michael
next_steps: Michael Weintraub: Deploy Salesforce trigger to send email notifications when a US campaign ends
Jeanette Sarmiento: Provide distribution list of traders to Michael Weintraub
Jeanette Sarmiento: Communicate new billing workflow to team before July billing cycle
One-off manual review of all June campaigns to ensure none were missed before automation goes live

recent_updates.summary: Phase 2 started. Blocked on meeting with Michael Weintraub for access, permissions, and approval before proceeding.

Meeting with Michael Weintraub and Jeanette on Jun 23. Jira approach rejected — email distribution list selected instead. Michael is deploying the Salesforce trigger by end of week. Jeanette providing recipient list.

projects.summary_for_manager: Phase 2 is 60% complete. After a meeting on June 23 with Michael Weintraub and Jeanette Sarmiento, the team aligned on using an email distribution list (instead of Jira) to notify traders when campaign end dates pass. Michael Weintraub is deploying the Salesforce trigger by end of week. Jeanette will provide the recipient list and communicate the new workflow to the team before the July billing cycle.

next_steps: Design Salesforce vs IO comparison logic
Identify key fields to validate (budgets, dates, metrics)
Build flagging system for discrepancies

recent_updates.summary: Planned. Will start after Phase 2 is complete.

projects.summary_for_manager: Phase 3 is planned but not yet started. The goal is a script that compares Salesforce data against the IO and flags discrepancies in budgets, dates, and metrics before they reach billing.
